title: Log shipping
subtitle: Forward this machine's systemd journal to a central Loki via Fluent Bit. Nexus configures the shipper; it does not store logs.
adminOnly: Configuring log egress requires an ADMIN role.

install.title: 1. Install the shipper
install.desc: Installs Fluent Bit from its official apt repository, with the signing key pinned by fingerprint. Ubuntu/Debian only.

configure.title: 2. Point it at Loki
configure.confirmDesc: This machine's journal will be forwarded to {{target}}. The config is written and Fluent Bit is (re)started.

disable.title: Disable shipping
disable.desc: Stops Fluent Bit and removes the Nexus-managed config. The journal stays local.
disable.confirmDesc: Fluent Bit will be stopped and the Nexus config removed. Logs stop being forwarded.

preview.title: Config preview
preview.desc: This is written to /etc/fluent-bit/nexus.yaml (root:root 0644). No changes are applied yet.
